---
title: "Delpasso & Motta"
output: html_document
---

<style>

#header {
display: none;
}

.page-wrapper {
min-height: 90vh;
display: flex;
flex-direction: column;
justify-content: center;
align-items: center;
padding: 20px 0;
}
.split-container {
display: flex;
flex-wrap: wrap;
justify-content: center;
gap: 50px;
width: 100%;
}
.profile-card {
flex: 1 1 300px; 
max-width: 450px;
text-align: center;
font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif;
}
.profile-img {
width: 200px;
height: 200px;
border-radius: 50%;
object-fit: cover;
margin-bottom: 20px;
}
h1.profile-name {
font-size: 2.2em;
font-weight: 500;
margin-bottom: 20px;
color: #333;
}
.links-container {
display: flex;
flex-wrap: wrap;
justify-content: center;
gap: 10px;
}
.button {
display: inline-block;
padding: 8px 16px;
border: 1px solid #dee2e6;
border-radius: 20px;
color: #6c757d;
text-decoration: none;
font-size: 0.9em;
transition: all 0.2s ease-in-out;
}
.button:hover {
border-color: #6c757d;
color: #343a40;
background-color: #f8f9fa;
text-decoration: none;
}
.button i {
margin-right: 6px;
}
.shared-section {
text-align: center;
margin-top: 50px;
font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif;
max-width: 800px;
}
.shared-btn {
font-size: 1.1em;
padding: 12px 24px;
background-color: #f8f9fa;
border-color: #ced4da;
color: #495057;
margin-bottom: 20px;
}
.shared-description {
font-size: 1.1em;
color: #495057;
line-height: 1.6;
}
</style>

<div class="page-wrapper">

<div class="split-container">
<div class="profile-card">
<img src="logoJp.png" alt="Jp" class="profile-img">
<h1 class="profile-name">João Pedro Delpasso</h1>
<div class="links-container">
<a href="https://github.com/JpdcJpdc" class="button"></i>GitHub</a>
<a href="https://jpdc.itch.io/" class="button">Itch.io</a>
<a href="mailto:joao_delpasso@hotmail.com" class="button">Email</a>
</div>
</div>
<div class="profile-card">
<img src="logoMe.png" alt="Maria Eduarda Motta Rosa" class="profile-img">
<h1 class="profile-name">Maria Eduarda Motta Rosa</h1>
<div class="links-container">
<a href="https://github.com/Maria-Eduarda-001" class="button">GitHub</a>
<a href="mailto:mariaeduardamottarosa001@aluno.ufsj.edu.br" class="button">Email</a>
</div>
</div>
</div>

<div class="shared-section">
<a href="./relatorio/index.html" class="button shared-btn">Acessar Relatórios</a>
<div class="shared-description">
<p>Página dedicada a apresentação da dupla, e a divulgação dos relatórios da disciplina de Estatística e Probabilidade.<br>Ainda em construção :)</p>
</div>
</div>

</div>
